titleStmt.title: SII 27.73: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 73. (A.R. No. 359 of 1930-31.) KANYANA, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in Gubbukōṇe Gōpālakṛishṇa temple.
This is dated Śaka 1320, Īśvara, Phālguṇa ba. 10, Thursday corresponding to 1398 A.D., March 13. The weekday however, was Wednesday.
It registers a sale deed of land made under certain conditions to Liṅgarasa by the six jananis, fifty of Jagattu and others Rājāḍi Kanyāna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruśa 1320 neya yisvavara saṁvatsarada phalguṇa
ba 10 gu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēsvaraṁ śrīvīrahariharamahārāyaru rājyedbhuda
yaṁgeyiva kāladoḷu rājāḍiya kaṁnyānada nāmnāṟa Āṟuvaṟa jananigaḷu Āyivatujagattu
haēkatrayavāgi mugitaḷiya paḍu rasara gōtrada liṁgarasarige kraya
dānavāgi koṭṭaśilāśāsanadakramaveṁteṁdare Ā liṁgarasarige naṁma nālkuŪru Ēkatrayavā
gi naṁmarājyaḍiyaraḷiya bhūmiyoḷage Oṁdu mukhadalu tiripaḍisi koṭṭadu mū
Ā catussīmeyoḷage nālvattaṟalekkadalu nālvattumūḍeya gaddeyanu krayadhārāpo
rvakavāgi Uru Ēkatrayavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyūgi sarvamāṁnyavāgi koṭṭa dā
na Ā bāḷige te vāsudēvarige ṭṭi ṁḍakaṭṭuṁdeṟu varuśaṁ prati kāṭi Oṁdoṁdu
hoṁna tettu baharu Avaṁnyāya Anāyabaḍḍise sebiḍāramaḷapuya rāyana
kāṇike daṁṇāyakara kāṇike Aḻakoṁḍu baṁda U nāu niṁmaūramērehāyi
koṁḍutettu bahevallade Alliṁda vanuge sarvabādhaparihāravāgi Avara makka
ḷu makkaḷu sisāṁtravāgi sarvamāṁnyadalu naḍasi bahau Ānālvattumuḍe
ya gaddeyoḷaguḷḷa nidhinikṣēpajala pāśāṇa AkṣīṇiĀgāmi siddhasādhyaAṣṭa
bhōgatējasvāṁmyadalu sukhadiṁ bhōgisuvaru yi dharṁmmakke Ārobbaru tapvidava
ru sōmasūryya grahaṇadalu vāraṇāsiyalu sāvirada yiṁnūṟu kavileyanu
brāhmaṇaranu taṁmakaiyāre vadhisidadōśa taṁma yippattoṁdu taleya pitru
gaḷanū raurau narakake yikkida . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānā śrēyōnupālanaṁ dā
nā svargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁpadaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ va yō harēti vasuṁ
dhara saṣṭirvvaruśa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 27.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
